records.pMessage:
Love in the crossfire! Love in the crossfire!
Aiming at your heart and fire!

Love in the crossfire! Love in the crossfire!
Looking right into your eyes—
→ Kiss of Fire!

Love is war,
and after a mere 3 seconds of looking,
I <locked on> to you
The battlefield doesn’t care what time it is,
and it’s <game over> the moment I give up
I take a ton of damage when I lose, no joke!

But yes! Girls have guts,
so I’ll prepare myself and go Full Brave!

I want to become an
<invincible and awesome sparkling girl>
So cute that you go totally crazy for me!

But…but…I can’t bring myself to be honest,
I can’t be cute
I want to change myself…
Hmph… I’ll go for broke with this shot!

Love in the crossfire! Love in the crossfire!
A maiden in love is invincible—fire!

Love in the crossfire! Love in the crossfire!
My love is about to explode—
→ Kiss of Fire!

What kind of girl do you like?
I asked jokingly,
while <firmly memorizing> your response
The battlefield doesn’t care where it is,
and <love is over> if all I do is run!

I’m mega traumatized
when it all blows up in my face, no joke!

But yes! Girls have nerves of steel,
so I’ll brace myself applying “No Defaulting”!

If I become
<an invincible and awesome sparkling girl>
Will you never let me out of your sight?

But…but…I’m not meant for that,
I have no self confidence
I want to change myself…
Hmph… I’m prepared for the worst!

Love in the crossfire! Love in the crossfire!
I’ll pour my heart and soul in this–fire!

Love in the crossfire! Love in the crossfire!
Oh, I see an opening—
→ Kiss of Fire!
